title: 👀 The US Army will annually check the testosterone level of military...
title_en: 👀 The US Army will annually check the testosterone level of military...
title_uk: 👀 Армія США щорічно перевірятиме рівень тестостерону військових...
description: 👀 The US Army will annually check the testosterone level of military personnel over the age of 30. The Pentagon is launching mandatory screening to ensure that military personnel are "in optimal shape." Those who are found to have a testosterone deficiency will be offered voluntary hormone therapy. Military personnel under the age of 30 will be able to undergo an examination at will. The new program does not yet apply to women - in...
description_en: 👀 The US Army will annually check the testosterone level of military personnel over the age of 30. The Pentagon is launching mandatory screening to ensure that military personnel are "in optimal shape." Those who are found to have a testosterone deficiency will be offered voluntary hormone therapy. Military personnel under the age of 30 will be able to undergo an examination at will. The new program does not yet apply to women - in...
description_uk: 👀 В армии США будут ежегодно проверять уровень тестостерона у военнослужащих старше 30 лет Пентагон запускает обязательный скрининг, чтобы убедиться, что военные находятся "в оптимальной форме". Тем, у кого выявят дефицит тестостерона, предложат добровольную гормональную терапию. Военнослужащие младше 30 лет смогут пройти обследование по желанию. description: Iermolaiev accuses Ukrainian intelligence officers of trying to kill him in Monaco. Ukraine's Prosecutor General's Office and the Security Service of Ukraine (SBU) said previously that the suspects were operating without the knowledge of HUR's leadership, and that the investigation was being conducted with the personal assistance of Military Intelligence Chief Oleh Ivashchenko.

title: 🛡️🇺🇦 It's been a year since the NATO PURL (Prioritized Ukraine...
title_en: 🛡️🇺🇦 It's been a year since the NATO PURL (Prioritized Ukraine...

description: 🛡️🇺🇦 It's been a year since the NATO PURL (Prioritized Ukraine Requirements List) initiative allows Ukraine to effectively receive critical weapons. It is within the framework of PURL that NATO coordinates the purchase for Ukraine of the necessary military weapons and equipment of American production at the expense of other member states of the Alliance and partner countries. The launch of this initiative became an important stage in the transformation of NATO's role in...
description_en: 🛡️🇺🇦 It's been a year since the NATO PURL (Prioritized Ukraine Requirements List) initiative allows Ukraine to effectively receive critical weapons. It is within the framework of PURL that NATO coordinates the purchase for Ukraine of the necessary military weapons and equipment of American production at the expense of other member states of the Alliance and partner countries. The launch of this initiative became an important stage in the transformation of NATO's role in...
description_uk: 🛡️🇺🇦 Уже рік, як ініціатива НАТО PURL (Prioritised Ukraine Requirements List) дозволяє Україні ефективно отримувати критично важливе озброєння. Саме в межах PURL НАТО координує закупівлю для України необхідного військового озброєння та техніки американського виробництва за кошти інших держав-членів Альянсу і країн-партнерів. Запуск цієї ініціативи став важливим етапом у трансформації ролі НАТО в...

title: Tributes were paid to the fallen Ukrainian soldiers together with the...
title_en: Tributes were paid to the fallen Ukrainian soldiers together with the...
title_uk: Вшанували загиблих українських воїнів разом із...
description: Tributes were paid to the fallen Ukrainian soldiers together with the Prime Minister of Great Britain, Keir Starmer. Thank you to Cyrus and Great Britain for the constant respect for our soldiers, for all those who gave their all for the defense of Ukraine and the whole of Europe. It is important to always remember the feat of all our people who defended Ukraine. Eternal gratitude to everyone who defended Ukraine from Russian aggression.
description_en: Tributes were paid to the fallen Ukrainian soldiers together with the Prime Minister of Great Britain, Keir Starmer. Thank you to Cyrus and Great Britain for the constant respect for our soldiers, for all those who gave their all for the defense of Ukraine and the whole of Europe. It is important to always remember the feat of all our people who defended Ukraine. Eternal gratitude to everyone who defended Ukraine from Russian aggression.
description_uk: Віддали шану загиблим українським воїнам разом із Прем’єр-міністром Великої Британії Кіром Стармером. Дякую Кіру та Великій Британії за незмінну повагу до наших воїнів, до всіх, хто віддав найдорожче заради захисту України і всієї Європи. Важливо завжди пам’ятати про подвиг усіх наших людей, які захищали Україну. Вічна вдячність кожному й кожній, хто боронив Україну від російської агресії.
